---
title: "Model Evaluation - 500 Profile Dataset"
author: "Team"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
library(yardstick)
library(here)

project_root <- normalizePath(file.path("..", "..", ".."))
processed_dir <- file.path(project_root, "data", "processed")
results_dir <- file.path(project_root, "results")

dir.create(results_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

# Introduction

In this section, we will evaluate the candidate models using multi-label
classification metrics and compare their performance on the validation and test
sets for the 500-profile dataset.

# Load Model Outputs

```{r load-model-outputs}
y_valid <- read_rds(file.path(processed_dir, "y_valid.rds"))
y_test <- read_rds(file.path(processed_dir, "y_test.rds"))
top_skills <- read_rds(file.path(processed_dir, "top_skills.rds"))

glmnet_valid_pred <- read_rds(file.path(results_dir, "glmnet_valid_pred.rds"))
xgb_valid_pred <- read_rds(file.path(results_dir, "xgb_valid_pred.rds"))

glmnet_test_pred <- read_rds(file.path(results_dir, "glmnet_test_pred.rds"))
xgb_test_pred <- read_rds(file.path(results_dir, "xgb_test_pred.rds"))

dim(y_valid)
dim(y_test)
length(top_skills)
```

# Metric Helpers

```{r metric-helpers}
calc_micro_metrics <- function(y_true, y_pred) {
  y_true_vec <- as.vector(y_true)
  y_pred_vec <- as.vector(y_pred)

  tp <- sum(y_true_vec == 1 & y_pred_vec == 1)
  fp <- sum(y_true_vec == 0 & y_pred_vec == 1)
  fn <- sum(y_true_vec == 1 & y_pred_vec == 0)

  precision <- ifelse(tp + fp == 0, 0, tp / (tp + fp))
  recall <- ifelse(tp + fn == 0, 0, tp / (tp + fn))
  f1 <- ifelse(
    precision + recall == 0,
    0,
    2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)
  )

  tibble(
    precision_micro = precision,
    recall_micro = recall,
    f1_micro = f1
  )
}

calc_macro_f1 <- function(y_true, y_pred, skill_names) {
  skill_f1 <- map_dbl(seq_along(skill_names), function(j) {
    yt <- y_true[, j]
    yp <- y_pred[, j]

    tp <- sum(yt == 1 & yp == 1)
    fp <- sum(yt == 0 & yp == 1)
    fn <- sum(yt == 1 & yp == 0)

    precision <- ifelse(tp + fp == 0, 0, tp / (tp + fp))
    recall <- ifelse(tp + fn == 0, 0, tp / (tp + fn))

    ifelse(
      precision + recall == 0,
      0,
      2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)
    )
  })

  tibble(macro_f1 = mean(skill_f1))
}

calc_subset_accuracy <- function(y_true, y_pred) {
  exact_match <- mean(apply(y_true == y_pred, 1, all))
  tibble(subset_accuracy = exact_match)
}

evaluate_multilabel <- function(y_true, y_pred, model_name, split_name, skill_names) {
  bind_cols(
    tibble(model = model_name, split = split_name),
    calc_micro_metrics(y_true, y_pred),
    calc_macro_f1(y_true, y_pred, skill_names),
    calc_subset_accuracy(y_true, y_pred)
  )
}
```

# Validation Comparison

```{r validation-comparison}
val_results <- bind_rows(
  evaluate_multilabel(y_valid, glmnet_valid_pred$class, "GLMNET", "Validation", top_skills),
  evaluate_multilabel(y_valid, xgb_valid_pred$class, "XGBoost", "Validation", top_skills)
)

val_results
```

# Test Comparison

```{r test-comparison}
test_results <- bind_rows(
  evaluate_multilabel(y_test, glmnet_test_pred$class, "GLMNET", "Test", top_skills),
  evaluate_multilabel(y_test, xgb_test_pred$class, "XGBoost", "Test", top_skills)
)

test_results
```

# Per-Skill F1

```{r per-skill-f1}
per_skill_f1 <- function(y_true, y_pred, model_name, split_name, skill_names) {
  tibble(
    skill = skill_names,
    f1 = map_dbl(seq_along(skill_names), function(j) {
      yt <- y_true[, j]
      yp <- y_pred[, j]

      tp <- sum(yt == 1 & yp == 1)
      fp <- sum(yt == 0 & yp == 1)
      fn <- sum(yt == 1 & yp == 0)

      precision <- ifelse(tp + fp == 0, 0, tp / (tp + fp))
      recall <- ifelse(tp + fn == 0, 0, tp / (tp + fn))

      ifelse(
        precision + recall == 0,
        0,
        2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)
      )
    }),
    model = model_name,
    split = split_name
  )
}

per_skill_results <- bind_rows(
  per_skill_f1(y_test, glmnet_test_pred$class, "GLMNET", "Test", top_skills),
  per_skill_f1(y_test, xgb_test_pred$class, "XGBoost", "Test", top_skills)
)

per_skill_results |>
  arrange(desc(f1)) |>
  print(n = 20)
```

# Save Outputs

```{r save-outputs}
write_csv(val_results, file.path(results_dir, "validation_results.csv"))
write_csv(test_results, file.path(results_dir, "test_results.csv"))
write_csv(per_skill_results, file.path(results_dir, "per_skill_results.csv"))

cat("Validation results saved to:", file.path(results_dir, "validation_results.csv"), "\n")
cat("Test results saved to:", file.path(results_dir, "test_results.csv"), "\n")
cat("Per-skill results saved to:", file.path(results_dir, "per_skill_results.csv"), "\n")
```
